channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘Pragmata’: A Parental Odyssey
item.description: Capcom's brand new IP delivers on gameplay innovation and an emotional story.

item.title: Best Buy CEO Corie Barry is stepping down: How she went from architect of a comeback to cautionary tale
item.description: Shares are up only 6% since she was appointed in 2019, vastly underperforming the S&P 500.

item.title: Sovereign AI: Why Owning The Full Stack Is The New Strategic Imperative
item.description: The central question is no longer whether an organization will use AI. It is how much of that AI the organization will actually own.

item.title: David’s Bridal exec has a warning for every CEO obsessed with AI’s return-on-investment
item.description: David's Bridal CBO Elina Vilk says companies chasing a discrete AI return-on-investment are asking the wrong question—and missing the real opportunity...

item.title: Bessent torches Democrat's ‘sanctions relief’ claims, calls $14B Iran/Russia charge a DNC talking point
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Sen. Chris Coons clash over claims that Iran gained $14 billion from temporary U.S. sanctions relief on oil.

item.title: Federal appeals court blocks California law requiring federal agents to wear badges or ID because it ‘attempts to directly regulate the U.S.’
item.description: The three-judge panel said the law violated the Constitution. California lawyers say the law applied evenly to all law enforcement officers.

item.title: A Car Rental Stock Soared 700% In A Month. Is It A Meme Stock?
item.description: Avis shares have skyrocketed in a matter of weeks, reminding investors of memestocks like GameStop.

item.title: Cursor’s 25-year-old CEO is a former Google intern who just inked a $60 billion deal with SpaceX
item.description: From Google intern at 18 to a billionaire at 25, Cursor CEO Michael Truell's rise is one of Silicon Valley's fastest.

item.title: Visa CMO: AI agents are your new customers — here’s how to sell to them
item.description: As AI takes over consumer decision-making, companies must rethink everything from product data to brand purpose — or risk being invisible.

item.title: Google Splits Its AI Chip. Here’s Why It Matters For Enterprises.
item.description: Google's 8th-gen TPUs split training and inference into two chips. Here's what it means for enterprise AI infrastructure strategy in 2026.

item.title: iOS 26.4.2: Apple Issues Unexpected iPhone Update To Block FBI Data Extraction Method
item.description: Apple has released a new iPhone update — that has taken many by surprise — to address a vulnerability that was recently exploited by the FBI.

item.title: Flight cuts are spreading as fuel costs surge. Higher fares are likely coming.
Nasdaq on pace for record close in final hour as tech leads stocks higher — live
Iran attacks oil tankers in Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices back above $100
4 takeaways from Trump Fed pick Kevin Warsh’s confirmation hearing
Nasdaq, S&P 500 close at record highs as tech sector drives stock-market gains
Who is Kevin Warsh, Trump's pick to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair?
item.description: President Donald Trump nominated former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh at the end of January to become chairman of the central bank.

item.title: How does Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh view the central bank's inflation goal?
item.description: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh is testifying before the Senate Banking Committee and has previously signaled support for a range-based approach to infl...

item.title: Trump says he wants 'somebody' to buy Spirit Airlines, opposes United-American merger
item.description: President Donald Trump says he wants someone to buy Spirit Airlines as the low-cost carrier battles bankruptcy and rising fuel costs threaten its reco...

item.title: DOJ reportedly pursuing criminal antitrust probe of major meatpacking companies
item.description: The DOJ is reportedly investigating four major beef companies in a criminal antitrust probe after Trump claimed meatpackers manipulated cattle prices.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
